description.value:
Prerequisite: Drive 4 ranks, Vehicle Expert.

Benefit: When the character attempts a sideswipe stunt with a surface vehicle, the character can force the other vehicle to a stop by nudging it into a controlled sideways skid. After succeeding on the sideswipe check, the character makes a Drive check opposed by the other driver. If the character succeeds, both vehicles end stationary and take normal sideswipe damage. If the character fails, resolve the sideswipe normally.
